title: Craig Brown
compiled_truth: Craig Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-02 to 2000-12-11), Craig Brown sent 4 and received 6 emails, totalling 10 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jennifer Medcalf](people/jennifer-medcalf) (4), [Heidi Smith](people/heidi-smith) (2), [Jeff Youngflesh](people/jeff-youngflesh) (1), [John Bone](people/john-bone) (1), [Sarah-Joy Hunter](people/sarah-joy-hunter) (1).
